name: Whirlwind Vial
description:
Activate 2 Interact

Opening this vial releases a mighty gust, forming into a fearsome Huge elemental hurricane. The elemental breathes a of air. Each creature in the cone must succeed at a save or be knocked away from the elemental. A creature knocked into a solid object stops moving and takes ].

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pushed 10 feet.

Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet and knocked .

Craft Requirements Supply magical residue from a slain elemental hurricane.
